issue.title: The Week AI Became Infrastructure
issue.dek: The useful story this week is not "more AI news." It is that AI is reorganizing into infrastructure layers: model portfolios, agent operating systems, distribution surfaces, compute supply chains, and power politics.

sections.title: Model News
sections.headline: Model News: The Race Is Splitting Into Lanes
sections.summary: The model market is splitting into specialized lanes: coding, realtime voice, open and efficient models, image/media, and science-oriented systems.

sections.title: All Things Agents
sections.headline: All Things Agents: From Chatbot to Operating Layer
sections.summary: Agents are becoming execution surfaces across files, folders, tools, browsers, documents, code, and workflows.

sections.title: Platform Plays
sections.headline: Platform Plays: AI Is Moving Into Existing Surfaces
sections.summary: AI is being embedded where users already work, search, design, and decide.

sections.title: Economics & Infrastructure
sections.headline: Economics & Infrastructure: Compute Is the Strategy
sections.summary: Compute, memory, power, cooling, data centers, and strategic access to capacity are becoming business constraints.

sections.title: Power Moves
sections.headline: Power Moves: The Drama Is Sometimes the Signal
sections.summary: Founder fights, lawsuits, surprise alliances, and platform politics reveal who controls compute, distribution, governance, and customer trust.
